description: A specific custom, belief, or practice passed down through generations. It is a single, structured thread within the broader tapestry of heritage.
sound_symbolism: The thoughtful 'the' honors tradition as conscious choice - not blind repetition but deliberate preservation of what matters. This consideration builds 're', the bridge across generations where ancestors meet descendants. The grounding 'ma' ensures traditions root in earth rather than floating as mere nostalgia. Three syllables span centuries: thoughtful selection, bridging time, grounding wisdom - the art of carrying forward what deserves to live.
